---
title: "More Bywords. By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘The Heir of Redclyffe’, ‘Unknown to History,’ etc.."
---

## More Bywords. By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘The Heir of Redclyffe’, ‘Unknown to History,’ etc..

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1890
**Genre:** Fiction
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Co.

### Notes

Like <i>Bye-Words</i> (<i>sic</i> note different spelling), a collection of stories earlier printed elsewhere: ‘The price of blood’,  ‘The cat of Cat Copse’, ‘De facto and de jure’,  ‘Sigbert\'s Guerdon’, ‘The beggar\'s legacy’, ‘A review of nieces’, ‘Come to her kingdom’, ‘Mrs. Batseyes’, and ‘Chops’.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
